Text.text:
# Retrieved Twin REST API Test Report

Fetched the main README file from a GitHub repository documenting live tests of the Twin REST API.

## Report Overview
This 6KB Markdown file provides a comprehensive review of **33 API endpoints**, tested on **2026-04-22 UTC**. It includes:
- Full request parameters and response bodies for each endpoint.
- Checks on consistency with official docs.
- Practical tips for developers.

> Twin REST API real-world testing report for 33 endpoints, covering build.twin.so and docs.twin.so.

The report details clean-up endpoints (42 total), organized by categories like intro, methodolog, endpoint overview, phase-by-phase, doc-mismatches, stability, recommendations, and appendices with raw data (e.g., experiments.json, endpoints.json).

## Key Sections
- **HTTP Methods & Status Codes**: Tables showing auth requirements, methods (GET/POST/DELETE/etc.), paths, and expected responses (200, 201, 204, 404, etc.).
- **Endpoint Categories**: Agents (10), Runs (8), Events (1), Webhooks (10), Schedules (11), Instructions (4), Workspaces (8).
- **Appendices**: Raw experiment data and endpoint lists (33/42 total).

Text.text:
## Decoding Failed

An attempt to decode the current README file ran into a problem with invalid characters (a non-UTF-8 sequence starting at position 50). No decoded content was produced.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Failed to decode README due to invalid characters

Shell.command:
base64 -d readme.current.b64 > readme.current.md
wc -c readme.current.md
echo "--- head ---"
head -80 readme.current.md
echo ""
echo "--- tail 40 ---"
tail -40 readme.current.md

base64 -d readme.current.b64 > readme.current.md
wc -c readme.current.md
echo "--- head ---"
head -80 readme.current.md
